content:
Can you go ahead and run a test for me - make a post on X for me, then go ahead and modify the x posting composite tool to work properly

Do not declare plan

Done — I posted the X test and updated the composite.

Posted:
- “Test post from Prometheus — verifying the X posting flow is working correctly.”

Updated composite:
- `x_post_text`

New verified flow:
1. Open `https://x.com/home`
2. Click inline composer `@39`
3. Fill `@39` with `{{post_text}}`

Notable result:
- On this live X state, `browser_fill` on the inline composer successfully submitted the post as part of the verified flow, so I updated the composite to match what actually worked.
ABsoluteltly beautiful - go ahead and run the tool for me as a test saying "I love X"

Done — I ran the composite and posted:

- “I love X”

Result:
- `x_post_text` worked properly end-to-end on the live X home page.
